homepageMessaging.title: Own a defensible local visibility territory
homepageMessaging.body: Slipstream should lead with optometry-specific market protection, not generic rankings. The promise: see which nearby competitors matter, protect a radius, and assign authority assets around local search demand.

homepageMessaging.title: Build search authority around the questions patients actually ask
homepageMessaging.body: Most agencies sell content volume. Slipstream should sell a mapped authority system: topics, question hubs, and local assignment rules for a single practice market.

homepageMessaging.title: Show the local evidence before asking for the retainer
homepageMessaging.body: The strongest agency pages use proof. Slipstream should make proof operational: competitor counts, protected radius, review zone, source diagnostics, and assignment status.

salesCallBullets.title: We do not claim to control Google.
salesCallBullets.body: We identify the local competitors, topics, and authority assets that shape visibility in your territory, then show where protection is open, reviewable, or conflicted.

salesCallBullets.title: We sell exclusivity around a market, not a generic SEO package.
salesCallBullets.body: A practice gets assigned authority assets and local visibility infrastructure for a defined territory. Nearby conflicts are flagged before work is sold.

salesCallBullets.title: Your report shows the exact competitors affected.
salesCallBullets.body: The prospect report should name the practices inside the protected radius and the review zone, so the buyer sees the market before they hear a pitch.

salesCallBullets.title: Optometry has its own search universe.
salesCallBullets.body: Slipstream maps eye exams, VSP, contact lenses, progressive lenses, and OD-vs-OMD authority separately instead of selling one-size-fits-all blog content.

avoidGenericClaims.title: We will rank you number one
avoidGenericClaims.body: Too common, risky, and undifferentiated. Replace with protected territory, competitor visibility, and measurable authority assignments.

avoidGenericClaims.title: Get more traffic
avoidGenericClaims.body: Generic traffic does not speak to an OD buyer. Replace with local patient-intent visibility by service line and territory.

avoidGenericClaims.title: Full-service SEO agency
avoidGenericClaims.body: The market is crowded with this language. Slipstream should sound like infrastructure and allocation, not another retainer menu.

avoidGenericClaims.title: AI search domination
avoidGenericClaims.body: The category is emerging and noisy. Use modern search readiness only when tied to structured question coverage and source-backed authority.
